expectations.evidence: Names are presented immediately with no preceding reasoning about core function or metaphor exploration. Each name has inline reasoning, but no upfront analysis step.
All 8 candidates (Onboard, Threshold, Bloom, Prism, Loom, Forge, Runway, Facet) are real English words
No candidates use banned generic terms. 'Onboard' is literal but not in the banned list.
All 8 candidates have 'Why' and 'Tradeoffs' sections explaining fit
